scripts.develop: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby clean && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby develop
scripts.build: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby clean && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby build
scripts.deploy: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby clean && XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby build --prefix-paths && gh-pages -d public
scripts.serve: XDG_CONFIG_HOME=.gatsby-config GATSBY_CPU_COUNT=1 GATSBY_TELEMETRY_DISABLED=1 NODE_OPTIONS=--no-deprecation gatsby serve
